picks.analysis: Mikal Bridges was huge in the second half of Game 2. With the Spurs blitzing Brunson, Bridges’ mid-range stroke was the Spurs’ kryptonite. He was steady on 8-for-13 shooting and anchored a third-quarter surge with Brunson and Karl-Anthony Towns on the bench. His Game 3 models flirt with 15 points and he's scored 13 or more points in nine of his last 11 postseason games.
picks.key: SA @ NYK|Prop|mikal bridges o12.5 points scored (-120)

consensus.key: SA @ NYK|Prop|mikal bridges o12.5 points scored (-120)
